title: Cute Wolves
description: It is a pack that lets you use the wolves from fresh animations with out the other animations! The work eyes are gone too.
body: ![Doggy Sleeping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db573db36ceab919a1c45d1bde4b24c971fc3cd4.png)It is a pack that lets you use the wolves from fresh animations with out the other animations! The work eyes are gone too. Your Best Friends Will Show So MUCH love now! Get this now and have awesome cute wolves! *ALL CREDITS TO THE OWNER OF FRESH ANIMATIONS*
